case_title: GATMAITAN ROMEO C DBA WES PAC TRADE GROUP VS PIZARRO MARCELO DBA DOMUS INTERIORS

docket_entries.description: CERT.RETURN REC.FOR MARCELO PIZARRO.NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GATMAITAN ROMEO C DBA WES PAC TRADE GROUP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PIZARRO MARCELO DBA DOMUS INTERIORS DEFT IS ORD'D TO DELIVER THE OVAL GLAS TOP TABLE & BARSTOOLS TO PLTF AT 9369 DOWDY DRIVE, SUITE A STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
